items.question: Who performs treatments at Glo de Vie?
items.answer: All treatments are performed by our licensed medical team, led by Amanda Gallagher-Dunning, MS, APRN-BC and overseen by Medical Director Dr. Benjamin Eskra, M.D.

items.question: Do you offer consultations?
items.answer: Yes. We recommend starting with a consultation so our team can assess your goals and recommend a personalized treatment plan. Consultations can be requested online or by phone.

items.question: What injectables do you offer?
items.answer: We offer neuromodulators including Botox and Dysport for fine lines and wrinkles, as well as a range of dermal fillers for volume restoration and facial contouring.

items.question: What is EMFACE?
items.answer: EMFACE is a non-invasive facial treatment that uses RF energy and HIFES technology to simultaneously treat skin and facial muscles, reducing wrinkles and lifting contours without needles or downtime.

items.question: Do you offer body contouring?
items.answer: Yes. We offer body transformation treatments using Exilis Ultra and Emsculpt technology for non-surgical fat reduction, muscle toning, and skin tightening.

items.question: What are your hours?
items.answer: Monday and Tuesday 8am to 7pm, Wednesday 8am to 5pm, Thursday 8am to 7pm, Friday 8am to 5pm, Saturday 9am to 3pm, Sunday closed.

items.question: Where are you located?
items.answer: We are located at 4209 Lassiter Mill Rd, Suite 133, Raleigh, NC 27609, in the North Hills area.
